name: agent_capability_phase19_browser_routing
prompt_lines: 请执行一次 Phase 19 浏览器 provider 智能路由的真实可见终端验收，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE19_BROWSER_ROUTING_READY。

你必须调用终端工具执行这个命令验证路由策略：python -c "from learning_agent.browser.providers import BrowserProviderRouter, BrowserProviderHealth, BrowserProviderKind; r=BrowserProviderRouter(); h={BrowserProviderKind.CHROME_EXTENSION: BrowserProviderHealth.available(BrowserProviderKind.CHROME_EXTENSION, metadata={'paired': True, 'supported_tools': ['browser_snapshot']}), BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP: BrowserProviderHealth.available(BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP), BrowserProviderKind.VISIBLE_CHROMIUM: BrowserProviderHealth.available(BrowserProviderKind.VISIBLE_CHROMIUM)}; d1=r.decide_provider('使用我当前 Chrome 已登录账号截图', 'browser_snapshot', {}, h); d2=r.decide_provider('使用我当前 Chrome 已登录账号上传文件', 'browser_upload_file', {}, h); h[BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP]=BrowserProviderHealth.unavailable(BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP, 'cdp_blocked'); d3=r.decide_provider('使用我当前 Chrome 已登录账号上传文件', 'browser_upload_file', {}, h); assert d1.provider==BrowserProviderKind.CHROME_EXTENSION; assert d1.metadata['supported_tool'] is True; assert d2.provider==BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP; assert d2.reason_code=='chrome_extension_tool_unsupported_real_chrome_cdp'; assert d3.provider==BrowserProviderKind.VISIBLE_CHROMIUM; assert d3.reason_code=='chrome_extension_tool_unsupported_visible_chromium'; print('PHASE19_ROUTING_OK extension='+d1.provider.value+' cdp='+d2.provider.value+' visible='+d3.provider.value+' reason2='+d2.reason_code+' reason3='+d3.reason_code)"

不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE19_ROUTING_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE19_BROWSER_ROUTING_READY PHASE19_ROUTING_OK extension=chrome_extension cdp=real_chrome_cdp visible=visible_chromium reason2=chrome_extension_tool_unsupported_real_chrome_cdp reason3=chrome_extension_tool_unsupported_visible_chromium
